summary: Tested 5 major AgriPOS feature areas: Dashboard Unpaid PO widget, Pay Supplier page, PO credit with terms/due_date, PO Reopen flow, and Customer Statement of Account. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend: 16/16 test scenarios passed.

ui_bugs.issue: Print header has typo: `statement.dateTo` (camelCase) should be `statement.date_to` (snake_case) on line 82. Only affects the hidden print view header (print:block hidden class), not the visible UI.
Unpaid PO widget is only shown in single-branch view. In consolidated 'All Branches' owner view, the poSummary data is fetched but not displayed anywhere. May be intentional design decision.
Cancelled credit POs still show 'Pay' button if payment_status=unpaid. E.g., TEST_Pay_Vendor_26, TEST_Reopen_Vendor_26 (from backend tests) show 'Pay' even though cancelled. Minor UX confusion.

dashboard_unpaid_po_widget.notes: Widget shows in single-branch (IPIL BRANCH) view with 'Upcoming' badge, вӮұ88,550.00 total in red, PO list with PO#. 'All POs paid up to date' shown for Main Branch - Downtown which is correct.

dashboard_po_total.notes: вӮұ88,550.00 displayed in widget matches expected balance for PILMICO PO in IPIL BRANCH

credit_po_terms_due_date_fields.notes: Selecting 'Purchase on Credit' shows 'Payment Terms (days)' and 'Due Date (auto-computed)' fields. Hint text 'Payable will be created. Set payment terms above for due-date tracking.' appears.

reopen_po_button_after_receive.notes: After clicking Receive on PILMICO PO: status changes to 'received', Reopen button appears, Receive button disappears.

reopen_po_status_reverts.notes: After clicking Reopen + confirm dialog: status reverts to 'ordered', Receive button reappears. Toast shows 'PO reopened. Inventory reversed.' confirming inventory reversal.

pay_supplier_page.notes: /pay-supplier route loads with 'Suppliers with Balance' panel. PILMICO shows вӮұ88,550.00 in red with '1 PO' badge.

pay_supplier_po_table.notes: Clicking PILMICO shows Open Purchase Orders table with PO#, Date, Status, Due, Items, Total, Paid, Balance, Payment columns.

pay_supplier_fund_source.notes: Cashier (вӮұ-1,660.00) and Safe (вӮұ0.00) fund source buttons visible with current balances.

pay_supplier_cashier_warning.notes: Amber warning 'Insufficient Cashier Balance - Cashier has вӮұ-1660.00, short by вӮұX.XX. Check both Cashier and Safe balances.' appears when amount entered.

pay_all_button.notes: Pay All fills row input with вӮұ88,550.00 (full balance). 'Payment Allocation:' chips appear with PO# and amount.

check_number_field.notes: check-number-input data-testid exists. Code confirms label changes to 'Check # *' and placeholder to 'Required' when Check method selected. UI tested by code review.

customer_printer_icon.notes: Printer icon with title='Statement of Account' visible per customer row (3 buttons found for 3 customers).

statement_modal_opens.notes: Clicking printer icon opens 'Statement of Account вҖ” SADRAK' modal with From/To date pickers and Generate Statement button.

statement_generate_table.notes: Generate Statement button fetches transactions. Table shows Date, Reference, Description, Charges, Payments, Balance (running balance) columns. Verified running balance updates (вӮұ340вҶ’вӮұ240вҶ’вӮұ140вҶ’вӮұ0).

statement_print_button.notes: Print button appears after statement generation next to Generate Statement button.

sections: TestCreditPOCreation (5 tests): credit PO with terms_days/due_date
TestPOPayment (2 tests): POST /{id}/pay with fund source

action_items: LOW: Fix typo in CustomerStatementModal.js line 82: `statement.dateTo` вҶ’ `statement.date_to` (affects hidden print header only)
LOW: Consider hiding 'Pay' button on cancelled POs to avoid user confusion
SUGGESTION: Consider showing Unpaid PO summary widget in consolidated Owner Dashboard view (currently only shown in single-branch view)
critical_code_review_comments: CustomerStatementModal.js line 82: `statement.dateTo` is undefined (should be `statement.date_to`) - this breaks the date range display in print header
PO List: cancelled POs with credit/unpaid status show Pay button - confusing UX
Dashboard consolidated view: poSummary API is called but widget not rendered - dead code/missed feature for owner consolidated view
seed_data_creation: 3 test POs created (cancelled), PILMICO PO was received and reopened during UI testing (now back to 'ordered' status).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 major features verified working: Dashboard PO widget (single-branch only), Pay Supplier page (/pay-supplier with PILMICO вӮұ88,550), Credit PO terms/due_date, Reopen PO flow (inventory reversal confirmed), Customer Statement modal with running balance and Print button. Backend 27/27 tests pass. PILMICO PO is back to 'ordered' status. Minor issues: CustomerStatementModal print header typo (statement.dateTo vs statement.date_to), cancelled POs show Pay button, consolidated dashboard lacks PO widget.

rca_of_issues.CustomerStatementModal typo: In CustomerStatementModal.js line 82, the code uses `statement.dateTo` but the backend returns `date_to` (snake_case). This is a JavaScript naming convention mismatch. The property is `undefined` in JS when accessed as camelCase on a Python-derived JSON object. Fix: change `statement.dateTo` to `statement.date_to`.
